# Test Brave Search server tool definitions (with fake API key)
env BRAVE_API_KEY=fake_api_key_for_testing
exec go run . --timeout=5s
stdin tools_request.json
wait 5s
stdout '"tools"'
stdout '"web_search"'
stdout '"news_search"'
stdout '"image_search"'
stdout '"video_search"'

-- tools_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}
